page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Ayanami Raising Project with Asuka Supplement Project 4Koma
text:
is a 4koma manga anthology series based on the video game Neon Genesis Evangelion: Ayanami Raising Project. It was published by Square Enix in two volumes in 2003.

Editions

Volume 1 (26 March 2004)
ISBN-10: ISBN 4757511779
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4757511774

Volume 2 (July 2004)
ISBN-10: ISBN 4757512457
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4757512450
